text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Commencing Mission: Birthday Party. Happy
birthday, Rice.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank you, Bourbon. But if you're with me,
you'll only be struck with misfortune—

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Beep. Inappropriate word detected: "misfortune."
Strike one activated. Two strikes left until
self-destruct sequence activates.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
H-huh?! You mean... if I say the word
"misfortune," then Bourbon... you'll explode?!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Beep. Inappropriate word detected again. One
strike left until—

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! I-I did it again! No... I don't want to see you
blow up!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Bourbon... I've always looked up to you. I mean,
you're super fast and super tough!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I-I love everything about you, Bourbon! Please
don't explode!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
A-are you okay, Bourbon? I didn't say another
inappropriate word, did I? Oh no... What if...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My self-destruct sequence has been put on hold.
However... my happiness levels are exploding.
